variables.notes: R:c. Selected an exact, unique debt-current-portion line outside the shortlist because it explicitly excludes leases. Manual review needed because other current interest-bearing debt may also exist in separate rows, but duplicated 'Interest-bearing liabilities' labels are ambiguous and could cause double counting.
